status: bounded repaired-operator transient/PTC evidence; not C3 convergence
exact_operator: hard visibility with certified float64 replay only for invalid float32 field hits; bounded grazing-ion reflection; no smoothing

fixed_physical_time_reference.convergence_statement: B1 and B2 fail; B2 is a ratio, so 8.4359 means 843.59 percent while the gate is 0.08 or 8 percent

restart_invariance.comparison: uninterrupted zero-charge 60-step trajectory versus zero-charge 20 steps plus checkpoint reload and 40 steps
restart_invariance.claim_boundary: checkpoint/restart invariance only; stationary cold-versus-remapped-warm branch invariance remains pending

late_window_exponential_fits.decision: no projected saturation time and no fit-and-jump: fitted B2 floors exceed the gate and potential rate is not described by a single exponential over this window

ser_schedule_refinement.common_start: the repaired fixed-time 2.5 microsecond face checkpoint

schedule_a.decision: reject as accelerator; repeated safeguard halvings make it slower than fixed time

schedule_b.decision: same-operator bounded accelerator at matched time; modest gain only and final schedule/state refinement remains required

lineage_replay_canary.trend: no monotone growth is observed; future runs permanently report the eligible denominator and fraction

accelerator_decisions.potential_space_state: do not implement: physical dV/dt already applies the exact Poisson response to conservative dQ/dt, while the authoritative face-charge to nodal-potential map is not invertible
accelerator_decisions.matrix_pseudotime_preconditioner: hold: requires an invertible face-charge mobility that preserves the compatible ledger and must be schedule-refined against physical time
accelerator_decisions.fit_and_jump: hold: potential-rate fit fails and fitted B2 floors exceed the gate
accelerator_decisions.equilibrium_tracking: retain: bitwise checkpoint/restart invariance supports continuation, but remapped-geometry stationary branch equality is still untested
accelerator_decisions.machine_learning_proposal: do not promote before a converged exact-operator state and held-out acceptance protocol exist

campaign_decision: continue bounded physical-time/PTC work; do not declare saturation, do not start C4, and do not add a new root-solver family
